[Skip to content](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/bed-bug-control/#content)

# Bed Bugs

bed bug control

## Waking Up With Bites?

Bed bugs are not a sign of a dirty home — they travel through luggage, apartments, and shared living spaces.

Dang Pest Control provides professional inspection and treatment for Tyler homes and multifamily communities.

Early detection prevents major infestations.


![Bed Bug Pest Control Service in Tyler TX](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/bed-bug-1.jpg)

#### bed bugs

# Bed Bug Control Services

When it comes to bed bug infestations, you need a reliable partner to restore your peace of mind—and your home. At [Dang Pest Control](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/), we specialize in effective, professional bed bug control services that eliminate bed bugs at every stage of their life cycle. Our expert technicians are ready to help you reclaim your home or property with advanced, eco-friendly treatments that deliver long-term results. We serve Tyler, TX, and the surrounding areas. Call us today at [(903) 871-0550](tel:(903) 871-0550) and [get your quote](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/quote/).

## Your Solution to Bed Bug Infestations

Bed bugs are small, persistent pests that can wreak havoc on your home and peace of mind. Found in bedding, furniture, walls, and even clothing, these bugs spread easily, especially in high-traffic areas like multi-unit buildings or shared accommodations. Bed bug infestations require more than a quick fix—they demand a targeted, expert approach.

[(903) 871-0550](tel:(903)%20871-0550)

[Get Your Quote](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/quote/)

## Our Bed Bug Control Process

Our bed bug pest control services follow a proven process to ensure your space is protected and pest-free.

## Step 1

## Inspection & Identification

![](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Control-Process-img1.png)

Our skilled technicians conduct a comprehensive inspection to identify bed bugs, locate their hiding spots, and determine how they entered your space.

## Step 2

## Integrated Pest Management Plan

![](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Control-Process-img2.png)

Using our in-depth expertise, we design an Integrated Pest Management Plan tailored to your specific needs. This step-by-step solution effectively eliminates bed bugs while minimizing disruption to your home or property.

## Step 3

## Thorough Treatment

![](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Control-Process-img3.png)

We use environmentally protective methods to eliminate every stage of the bed bug lifecycle—eggs, larvae, and adults. Limited preparation is required from you, and our process ensures long-term results.

## Step 4

## Monitoring & Follow-Up Care

![](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Control-Process-img4.png)

After treatment, we monitor the effectiveness of our solutions and conduct follow-ups if necessary. For your added peace of mind, we protect your space for up to 3 consecutive months post-treatment.

[Get Your Quote](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/quote/)

## Why Choose Us?

When it comes to bed bug control, experience and expertise matter. Here’s why homeowners, property managers, and business owners in Tyler, TX and surrounding areas trust us:

![](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Proven-Results.png)

### Comprehensive Bed Bug Control Services

From detailed inspections to thorough treatments, we leave nothing to chance. Our experts understand the behavior of bed bugs and use proven techniques for complete eradication.

![](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Comprehensive.png)

### Certified & Trusted Technicians

Our team is part of the National Pest Management Association (NPMA) and Texas Pest Control Association (TPCA), ensuring you receive industry-leading service and expertise.

![](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Safety.png)

### Environmentally Friendly Solutions

We prioritize solutions that are effective yet environmentally protective. Bed bugs are no match for our process, and neither is your peace of mind.

![](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Guarantee.png)

### Expertise Beyond Bed Bugs

While we specialize in bed bug extermination, our services extend to a wide range of pests—including ants, spiders, termites, and more. We’re your one-stop solution for pest control needs.

![](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Custom-Plans.png)

### Local & Reliable Service

We take pride in serving our neighbors in Tyler, Longview, Jacksonville, Lindale, Bullard, and Whitehouse.

## Facts About Bed Bugs

Bed bugs are a common problem across the United States, impacting approximately 20% of homes and hotels each year. Studies show that one in five Americans has experienced a bed bug infestation or knows someone who has. Understanding these persistent pests is key to effective prevention and treatment. Learn more by reading our frequently asked questions below.

Our specialized bed bug extermination service includes a thorough inspection by highly trained technicians, followed by a targeted treatment plan that eliminates bed bugs at all stages of life—including eggs, larvae, and adults. With minimal preparation required on your part, our treatments are designed to provide long-lasting relief.

## Frequently Asked Questions

How common are bed bugs?

The Southeast region of the U.S. has the highest concentration of bed bugs, accounting for 29% of the country’s infestations.

Bed bugs are common in places with a high turnover of people, like hotels and hostels.

How do bed bugs spread?

Bed bugs spread quickly by hitching a ride on people’s clothing or luggage. They can be found in any environment where people are in large groups. Bed bugs can travel between rooms in multi-unit buildings, such as hotels and apartment complexes. They can also be carried by wild animals, such as bats or birds.

What are bed bugs like?

Bed bugs are small, flat, wingless insects that are reddish-brown in color. They are about the size of a Lincoln penny head. Bed bugs bite people and animals at night while they sleep.

Are bed bugs a sign of poor hygiene?

No. Bedbugs are attracted to warmth, blood, and carbon dioxide, not dirt.

What are the symptoms or side effects of bed bug bites?

The primary side effect of bed bug bites is intense itching at the bite site. These bites often appearing as red bumps in a line or cluster, which can lead to secondary skin infections from scratching. In some cases, allergic reactions including hives or swelling may occur. Additionally, severe infestations can cause sleep disturbances and anxiety due to the stress of being bitten repeatedly.

What does bed bug extermination include?

Our treatments include identifying the source of the infestation, an Integrated Pest Management Plan, and follow-up care to ensure long-term results. We target the full life cycle of bed bugs, including eggs, larvae, and adults.

How much preparation is required before your visit?

There is some preparation required by the customer prior to bed bug extermination services. House cleaning is suggested if you want to get the most benefit out of your bed bug extermination. These things are optional and can include:

- Stripping and washing all bedding, and drying it with high heat if possible. This includes mattress covers and pillows.
- Washing draperies and all clothing in hot water and drying with high heat if possible.
- Sealing laundered items in a plastic bag until the extermination has been completed.
- Clearing out your closets should be seriously considered.

Please refrain from the urge to go vacuum crazy or disposing of those disgusting bed bug carcasses or droppings, as these things actually help the technicians identify and target the infested areas.

What other pests do you handle?

We provide services for many other pests such as [ants](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/ant-control/), [spiders](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/spider-control/), wasps and hornets, scorpions, rodents, mosquitos, fleas and ticks, roaches, bed bugs, and termites.

## Get Your Free Quote

Don’t allow bed bugs to disrupt your life. Act now with Dang Pest Control’s proven and effective bed bug control services. Located in Tyler, TX, we proudly serve [Longview](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/longview-tx/), [Jacksonville](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/jacksonville-tx/), [Lindale](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/lindale-tx/), [Bullard](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/bullard-tx/), [Whitehouse](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/whitehouse-tx/), and surrounding areas. Call us today at [(903) 871-0550](tel:(903) 871-0550) and [get your quote](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/quote/).

[Get Your Quote](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/quote/)

![](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/bed-bug-2.jpg)

## Frequently Asked Questions

###### 1\. Are bed bugs common in East Texas?

Yes. Bed bugs are found in homes, apartments, hotels, and student housing throughout Tyler and East Texas.

###### 2\. How do bed bugs spread?

They travel on luggage, clothing, furniture, and through shared walls in apartments.

###### 3\. Can I treat bed bugs myself?

DIY treatments often fail because bed bugs hide in mattress seams, wall voids, and furniture cracks. Professional treatment is strongly recommended.

###### 4\. How quickly do bed bugs multiply?

Bed bugs reproduce quickly and can become a major infestation within weeks if untreated.

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%201800%20695'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

## Protect Your East Texas Home Today

East Texas heat, humidity, and piney woods conditions create the perfect environment for pests year-round. Don’t wait until a small problem becomes a major infestation.

Dang Pest Control provides safe, effective, and recurring protection for homes across Tyler, Whitehouse, Bullard, Lindale, Flint, and surrounding communities.
